description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-badge

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-badge` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] P2 items documented in AUDIT.md for future backlog: contrast verification, prefers-reduced-motion test, Drupal Twig example
- [ ] `hx-size` attribute naming is flagged as a cross-component concern, not a per-component fix

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817611224-m6h4kbfp9`
title: Post-Audit: hx-badge — follow-up items
